agents-coding.name: Agents & Coding
agents-coding.blurb: Autonomous agents, coding CLIs, and the tooling that lets software write software.

local-private-ai.name: Local & Private AI
local-private-ai.blurb: Run it on your own machine. No cloud, no telemetry, no one reading over your shoulder.

models-weights.name: Models & Weights
models-weights.blurb: Language models whose weights you can actually download, inspect, and fine-tune.

generative-media.name: Generative Media
generative-media.blurb: Open image and video generation — the models and the tools that drive them.

audio-voice.name: Audio & Voice
audio-voice.blurb: Speech synthesis, music generation, and everything the open ecosystem can make you hear.

retrieval-knowledge.name: Retrieval & Knowledge
retrieval-knowledge.blurb: RAG engines, embeddings databases, and knowledge graphs that ground models in your data.

computer-vision.name: Computer Vision
computer-vision.blurb: Detection, segmentation, and tracking — the open eyes of the stack.

robotics.name: Robotics & Embodied AI
robotics.blurb: Open policies, datasets, and toolkits for AI that moves things in the physical world.

science-data.name: Science & Data
science-data.blurb: Foundation models for molecules, weather, and materials — plus the data tools around them.

experimental.name: Experimental & Unusual
experimental.blurb: The strange, the surprising, and the not-quite-categorizable edge of open-source AI.

daybreak.name: Daybreak
daybreak.blurb: The newest arrivals — projects added in the latest weekly edition.

night-shift.name: Night Shift
night-shift.blurb: Fully offline, local-first tools. These keep working when the internet doesn't.

first-light.name: First Light
first-light.blurb: Beginner-friendly. Install one thing, get a result, feel the pull.

deep-water.name: Deep Water
deep-water.blurb: Research-grade and resource-hungry. Rewarding, if you know what you're sailing into.

fine-print.name: The Fine Print
fine-print.blurb: Famous repos that look open source but aren't — and exactly what their licenses actually allow.
